prompt: I am a civil engineering teacher, need to create a course design syllabus for Concrete Structure Course Design. 2 credits, 32 hours (2 weeks), juniors. Include OBE and ideological-political elements.

assertions.name: six-sections
assertions.assertion: output contains '一、课程' AND output contains '二、课程教学内容' AND output contains '三、建议教材' AND output contains '四、考核形式' AND output contains '五、有关说明' AND output contains '六、课程建设与改革'

assertions.name: grad-req-matrix
assertions.description: Course objectives to graduation requirements matrix
assertions.assertion: output contains '课程目标' AND output contains '毕业要求' AND (output contains '表1' OR output contains '支撑' OR output contains '矩阵')

assertions.name: section5-substantive
assertions.assertion: output contains '五、有关说明' AND (output contains '先修' OR output contains '衔接' OR output contains '开课学期' OR output contains '修读' OR output contains '前置')

assertions.name: section6-substantive
assertions.assertion: output contains '立德树人' AND output contains '教学思想' AND output contains '教学方法' AND output contains '教学手段'
